_note: Button template: a text message with 1–3 action buttons. Button types: 'web_url' (opens URL), 'postback' (fires messaging_postbacks event), 'phone_number' (dials E.164 number). Text max 640 chars. Not supported on Instagram — use instagram_outbound_template_generic instead.

payload.text: What would you like to do with your order #12345?
